description_long: This object consists of five lipsticks arranged on a light wood-textured square platform. Each lipstick features a cylindrical body with a glossy black lower section and a metallic gold upper section, topped with a colored lipstick bullet in shades of red, purple, pink, and blue. The lipsticks are presented both with and without their caps, which are rounded, smooth, and match the black and gold color scheme. The lipstick bullets are angled at the tip, typical of standard lipstick design, and the gold band at the base of each bullet adds a touch of elegance. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a focus on bold, vibrant colors. The arrangement and finish suggest a display or promotional setup for personal care products.
description: A set of five sleek, black and gold lipsticks with vibrant colored tips, displayed on a light wood platform. The lipsticks feature glossy finishes and a modern, elegant design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four upright lipsticks and one with its cap removed, revealing the colored tips and gold bands.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting all five lipsticks, with caps placed beside or in front, emphasizing the color variety and arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the lipsticks from behind, with one cap set aside and the colored tips visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the lipsticks and their caps, focusing on the symmetry and the glossy finish of the bodies.
attribute_cap_design: Rounded, smooth, glossy black with a gold band at the base, no visible decorative elements.
